title: Resolve all merge conflicts from rebase in C/Kconfig/DTS/main.c files for lichen/apps/gateway/* boards/* samples/* subsys/lichen/*
description: Merge changes from both sides in conflicted files following LICHEN C guidelines (prefixes LICHEN_*/SCHC_*/etc, init order from AGENTS.md, BUILD_ASSERT, no dead code/comments, robustness, test vector match). Resolve without losing functionality. Then west build and git add.
